title: Luna Edit
description: One of most downloaded packs on my discord server.
body:
# 🌌 Luna Edit — PvP Resource Pack

**✨ Short Description**  
Embrace the cosmos with Luna Edit 🔮. A galactic-styled PvP pack with purple hues, glowing details, and crystal-clear visibility.  

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌌 Stunning **purple galaxy sky**.  
- 🗡️ Custom swords & armor in violet tones.  
- 💜 Heart & hunger bars with glowing style.  
- 📦 Reworked blocks & GUI with neon highlights.  
- ⚡ FPS-friendly — smooth performance even in fights.  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` file.  
2. ⚙️ Go to Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Drop the zip in, enable it.  
4. 🔄 Apply the changes.  

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**  
- 🪐 Works great with [FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Lunar, Badlion, Feather & more.  
- ✅ Perfect for PvP and competitive gameplay.  

---
